item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Passage of the largely symbolic measure comes as the U.S. and Iran are in the early stages of talks aimed at ending the war.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-IRAN-US-ISRAEL-WAR
media:content.media:description: A plume of smoke rises after a strike on the Iranian capital Tehran, on March 3.

item.title: Senate rebukes Trump by approving House-passed measure calling for end to Iran war

item.dc:creator: Monica Alba
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is changing the guidelines for Iran’s national soccer team ahead of its third World Cup match on Friday to accommodate extra time afforded to other countries in the tournament, a department spokesperson told NBC News

media:content.media:text: Belgium v IR Iran: Group G - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Mehdi Taremi of Iran celebrates a goal against Belgium on June 21 in Los Angeles, Calif.

item.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: On Monday, Norwegians were spotted across New York City dressed in red doing the “Viking row,” a fan ritual in which they sit side by side, packed tightly together as if on a ship and mimic as if they were rowing oars in unison.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland smiles while standing on the football field
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland of Norway celebrates the first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group I match against Senegal on June 22, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland of Norway celebrates after scoring his second goal to make it 3-1 in Monday's World Cup match against Senegal.
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland of Norway celebrates after scoring his second goal to make it 3-1 in Monday's World Cup match against Senegal.

item.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race

item.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

media:content.media:title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
media:content.media:description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

item.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match

item.dc:creator: Amin Khodadadi
Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

media:content.media:text: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: A billboard in Tehran shows an AI-generated image of Iranian goalkeeper Alireza Beiranvand holding one of the victims of a U.S. strike on a school.
media:content.media:description: A billboard in Tehran shows an AI-generated image of Iranian goalkeeper Alireza Beiranvand holding one of the victims of a U.S. strike on a school.

media:content.media:text: Soccer fans watch the game at Viking Cafe in North Tehran.
media:content.media:description: Soccer fans watch the game at Viking Cafe in North Tehran.

media:content.media:text: A message at Viking Cafe in North Tehran on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: A message at Viking Cafe in North Tehran on Sunday.

item.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

media:content.media:text: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal surrounded by teammates on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal during the World Cup Group D game against Australia on Friday.

media:content.media:text: John Denver performs onstage
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal during the World Cup Group D game against Australia on Friday.

item.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

media:content.media:text: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal surrounded by teammates on the soccer field
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal during the World Cup Group D game against Australia on Friday.

media:content.media:text: John Denver performs onstage
media:content.media:description: Alex Freeman of the United States celebrates a goal during the World Cup Group D game against Australia on Friday.

item.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm

item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo protagonizó un intenso intercambio con la prensa, molestándose porque en el espacio estaba recibiendo sólo preguntas sobre su rivalidad con Lionel Messi. Incluso, retiró la palabra a uno de los periodistas y terminó molesto.

media:content.media:title: Cristiano Ronaldo no se guardó nada y dejó varios titulares tras el partido
media:content.media:description: Cristiano Ronaldo protagonizó un intenso intercambio con la prensa, molestándose porque en el espacio estaba recibiendo sólo preguntas sobre su rivalidad con Lionel Messi. Incluso, retiró la palabra a uno de los periodistas y terminó molesto.

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo no se guardó nada y dejó varios titulares tras el partido

item.description: La selección de Inglaterra realizó su entrada en calor en Boston antes de enfrentar a Ghana. Harry Kane, Jude Bellingham y compañía buscan una nueva victoria para acercarse a los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Inglaterra está lista para su segundo partido de la Copa del Mundo
media:content.media:description: La selección de Inglaterra realizó su entrada en calor en Boston antes de enfrentar a Ghana. Harry Kane, Jude Bellingham y compañía buscan una nueva victoria para acercarse a los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Inglaterra está lista para su segundo partido de la Copa del Mundo

item.description: Nuestros expertos ya están en Boston para el enfrentamiento entre Inglaterra y Ghana. Jozy Altidore y Adriana Monsalve detectan deficiencias defensivas en los “Tres Leones”.

media:content.media:title: Jozy Altidore: “Inglaterra tiene que mejorar defensivamente” | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos ya están en Boston para el enfrentamiento entre Inglaterra y Ghana. Jozy Altidore y Adriana Monsalve detectan deficiencias defensivas en los “Tres Leones”.

item.title: Jozy Altidore: “Inglaterra tiene que mejorar defensivamente” | Pasión Mundial

item.description: El técnico de la Selección de Portugal habló tras el partido donde su equipo goleó 5-0, con los primeros goles de su estrella.

media:content.media:title: Roberto Martínez reacciona a los goles de Cristiano Ronaldo: "Era cuestión de tiempo"
media:content.media:description: El técnico de la Selección de Portugal habló tras el partido donde su equipo goleó 5-0, con los primeros goles de su estrella.

item.title: Roberto Martínez reacciona a los goles de Cristiano Ronaldo: "Era cuestión de tiempo"

item.description: Portugal demuestra por qué son favoritos al título y golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán en Houston. Cristiano Ronaldo brilló con un doblete que encaminó la victoria y lo pone como figura del partido.

media:content.media:title: ¡El Show de CR7! Portugal golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán y se repone en el Mundial.
media:content.media:description: Portugal demuestra por qué son favoritos al título y golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán en Houston. Cristiano Ronaldo brilló con un doblete que encaminó la victoria y lo pone como figura del partido.

item.title: ¡El Show de CR7! Portugal golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán y se repone en el Mundial.

item.description: Un doblete le dio la tranquilidad a Cristiano, y el 5-0 a Portugal, luego de vencer a Uzbekistán y dar por segura su clasificación. El delantero reconoció que enfrentó momentos difíciles por las críticas, pero sabe que trabaja para la selección.

media:content.media:title: Cristiano: "Fue una semana difícil, pero he vuelto, he vuelto"
media:content.media:description: Un doblete le dio la tranquilidad a Cristiano, y el 5-0 a Portugal, luego de vencer a Uzbekistán y dar por segura su clasificación. El delantero reconoció que enfrentó momentos difíciles por las críticas, pero sabe que trabaja para la selección.

item.title: Cristiano: "Fue una semana difícil, pero he vuelto, he vuelto"

item.description: El delantero inglés ajusta su segunda titularidad consecutiva con su Selección y sabe que el control mental y ahora, aprovechar la lluvia como factor de juego, pueden darle a su grupo ventajas para vencer a Ghana.

media:content.media:title: Anthony Gordon cree que la lluvia puede favorecer el juego de Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: El delantero inglés ajusta su segunda titularidad consecutiva con su Selección y sabe que el control mental y ahora, aprovechar la lluvia como factor de juego, pueden darle a su grupo ventajas para vencer a Ghana.

item.title: Anthony Gordon cree que la lluvia puede favorecer el juego de Inglaterra

item.description: Nélson Semedo avanzó por la derecha y buscó a Cristiano Ronaldo dentro del área, pero un desvío dejó el balón servido para Rafael Leão. El delantero sacó un potente remate al ángulo para marcar el quinto gol de Portugal ante Uzbekistán.

media:content.media:title: Rafael Leao cierra la goleada de Portugal con un potente remate
media:content.media:description: Nélson Semedo avanzó por la derecha y buscó a Cristiano Ronaldo dentro del área, pero un desvío dejó el balón servido para Rafael Leão. El delantero sacó un potente remate al ángulo para marcar el quinto gol de Portugal ante Uzbekistán.

item.title: Rafael Leao cierra la goleada de Portugal con un potente remate

item.description: Bruno Fernandes ejecutó el tiro de esquina y, tras varios rebotes dentro del área, el arquero Abduvokhid Nematov terminó empujando el balón a su propia portería para el cuarto gol de Portugal ante Uzbekistán.

media:content.media:title: ¡Increíble autogol! Portugal aumenta la ventaja ante Uzbekistán
media:content.media:description: Bruno Fernandes ejecutó el tiro de esquina y, tras varios rebotes dentro del área, el arquero Abduvokhid Nematov terminó empujando el balón a su propia portería para el cuarto gol de Portugal ante Uzbekistán.

item.title: ¡Increíble autogol! Portugal aumenta la ventaja ante Uzbekistán

item.description: Jorge Valdano analiza la presión que rodea a Cristiano Ronaldo y cuestiona las críticas por no marcar. Para el exfutbolista argentino, resulta injusto poner en duda a un jugador que está cerca de alcanzar los 1,000 goles en su carrera.

media:content.media:title: ¿Se está siendo injusto con Cristiano Ronaldo? | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jorge Valdano analiza la presión que rodea a Cristiano Ronaldo y cuestiona las críticas por no marcar. Para el exfutbolista argentino, resulta injusto poner en duda a un jugador que está cerca de alcanzar los 1,000 goles en su carrera.

item.title: ¿Se está siendo injusto con Cristiano Ronaldo? | Vive el Mundial

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
item.description: The parties will also set up a handful of key House battleground races as voters in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah pick nominees.

media:content.media:text: NYC Mayor Mamdani Holds Get Out The Vote Rally Ahead Of Primary Election
media:content.media:description: From left: Brad Lander, Claire Valdez, Bernie Sanders, Zohran Mamdani and Darializa Avila Chevalier in Brooklyn, N.Y., last week.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani’s clout and a double Trump endorsement on the line in today’s primaries

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: Steve Kornacki is getting ready for another night at the Big Board, where he’ll break down primary election results in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah on Tuesday

media:content.media:text: Steve Kornacki
media:content.media:description: Steve Kornacki

item.title: Send your midterm elections questions for Steve Kornacki

item.dc:creator: Aria Bendix
item.description: A study on the effectiveness of Covid vaccines that the CDC’s acting director previously blocked from publiation came out Tuesday in a different journal.

media:content.media:text: A Clinic Administers Fourth Doses Of Covid-19 Vaccine Booster
media:content.media:description: A woman receives a Covid shot at a vaccine clinic inside Trinity Evangelic Lutheran Church in Lansdale, Pa., on April 5, 2022.

item.title: Covid vaccine study the acting CDC director blocked is published in an outside journal

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
Gary Grumbach
item.description: A sixth person has been arrested in connection with the alleged vandalism of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, President Donald Trump said Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: A worker cleans the waters of the Reflecting Pool in Washington on June 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A worker cleans the waters of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Chipped paint and algae are visible in the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A worker cleans the waters of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on Tuesday.

item.title: 6 people arrested in connection with the alleged vandalism of the Reflecting Pool, Trump says

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: Strikes that have caused fuel shortages and power outages in Crimea will prove a “psychological breaking point” for Moscow, a Ukrainian commander said.

media:content.media:text: A satellite image shows fire and smoke rising from oil tanks, after what Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said was an attack on an oil depot in the city of Kerch
media:content.media:description: Thick smoke clouds from what Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said was an attack on an oil depot in the city of Kerch, Crimea on June 21, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Footage released by Robert Brovdi, the commander of Ukraine’s Unmanned Systems Forces, on Sunday appears to show an oil depot on fire in Kerch, Crimea.
media:content.media:description: Footage released by Robert Brovdi, the commander of Ukraine’s Unmanned Systems Forces, on Sunday appears to show an oil depot on fire in Kerch, Crimea.

media:content.media:text: Russia Crimea Daily Life June 21, 2026
media:content.media:description: Sunseekers at the beach by the Black Sea in Yevpatoria, Crimea, on Saturday.

item.title: Ukraine ramps up pressure on Putin by targeting his ‘sacred place’ of Crimea

item.description: A dangerous heatwave is gripping Europe, with millions under heat alerts. Meteorologists blame a massive heat dome, a ridge of high pressure trapping hot air from North Africa. Scientists warn human-driven climate change is making the extreme heat more frequent and more intense. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Deadly Heatwave Blankets Europe With Record High Temperatures
media:content.media:description: A dangerous heatwave is gripping Europe, with millions under heat alerts. Meteorologists blame a massive heat dome, a ridge of high pressure trapping hot air from North Africa. Scientists warn human-driven climate change is making the extreme heat more frequent and more intense. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

item.title: Deadly Heatwave Blankets Europe With Record High Temperatures

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Shop the best Amazon Prime Day 2026 deals live now, hand-picked by editors. There’s savings on Apple, Oura, Shark, Le Creuset and more during the four-day sale.
item.title: I’ve covered Prime Day for 7 years — these are the 121+ best deals actually worth shopping (live updates)

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
